User.title: User Profile
User.description: User profile containing public information and hidden moderation fields.

area.description: User's self-reported area or location in Bangladesh.

joinedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user joined.

postsCount.description: Count of total posts created by the user.

falsePostCount.description: Count of posts from this user voted as false news by the community (hidden from public UI).

spamCount.description: Spam score or behavior indicators tracked by backend (hidden from public UI).

flagged.description: Whether this user account is flagged for admin review (hidden from public UI).

Post.title: Incident or civic demand report
Post.description: A community reported incident (alert) or civic demand.

title.description: Brief title of the incident or demand.

locationName.description: Readable area name converted from coordinates.

type.description: Whether it is an emergency Alert or Civic Demand.

category.description: Category (e.g. Fire, Accident, Flood, Storm, Robbery/Crime, Road damage, Water problem, Electricity problem, Gas leak, Other).

authorId.description: UID of the author who posted.

authorPhone.description: Masked or blank phone of the author.

authorName.description: Display name of the author (fallback to Anonymous if anonymous).

isExpired.description: Whether the post is moved to the expired archive.

reportsCount.description: Number of times this post is reported.

isFlagged.description: Whether the post is held for admin moderation.

Vote.title: Vote entry
Vote.description: A user's vote on a post to avoid duplicate voting.

voteType.description: The specific vote cast by the user.

Comment.title: Comment on a report
Comment.description: Discussion, status update, photos from locals.

isUpdate.description: Whether this is a status update (e.g. 'Fire is now extinguished').

reportsCount.description: Number of of reports on this comment.

Report.title: Abuse or false report registry
Report.description: Reports filed by the community against post or comment for admin review.

targetId.description: The ID of the reported content.

postId.description: Post ID (for context if target is comment).

users/{userId}.description: User profiles which store profile particulars and hidden security scores.

posts/{postId}.description: Collection of emergency alerts and civic demands.

posts/{postId}/votes/{userId}.description: Individual voting records per post to guarantee one-user-one-vote.

posts/{postId}/comments/{commentId}.description: Threaded comments or community-led status updates.

reports/{reportId}.description: Admin review request documents for reported posts and comments.
